data.title: World Co. Slightly Revises 2027 Profit Forecast, Keeps Growth Strategy Intact
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

WORLD CO ( (JP:3612) ) has provided an update.

World Co. has issued a partial correction to its recently announced consolidated financial results for the year ended February 28, 2026, adjusting only the forecast for profit before financing and income taxes for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2027. The figure was revised slightly downward from ¥17.75 billion to ¥17.55 billion, while revenue, business profit, operating profit and profit attributable to owners of parent remain unchanged, and management reaffirmed its expectation of higher sales and earnings in the first year of its new “VISION-W” plan, supported by the full-year consolidation of RIGHT-ON and continued investments across both B2C and B2B segments.

The company reiterated that its broader strategic direction is intact, highlighting plans to tackle merchandising issues in its apparel brands while investing in lifestyle and circular businesses. On the B2B side, it aims to accelerate growth in technology and people operations and boost external supply-chain sales through group synergies, suggesting the correction is a technical adjustment rather than a shift in earnings outlook or strategy for stakeholders.

More about WORLD CO

World Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based apparel and fashion company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market. The group operates B2C apparel brands and lifestyle businesses as well as B2B operations in technology, people operations and supply-chain services, pursuing synergies with group companies such as MC Fashion Co., Ltd. and RIGHT-ON Co., Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 435,358

Current Market Cap: Yen115.9B

data.title: Ensurge Micropower Secures NOK 60 Million Convertible Loan Backed by Insider-Linked Investor
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Ensurge Micropower ( (ENMPF) ) is now available.

Ensurge Micropower has arranged a NOK 60 million convertible loan financing with a conversion price of NOK 1.00 per share, strengthening its capital structure through equity-linked funding. Coretech AS, a close associate of board member and primary insider Thomas Ramm, has committed NOK 20.47 million of this facility, highlighting insider-linked support for the transaction.

As part of the financing package, lenders will receive one warrant for every NOK five allocated, each warrant entitling the holder to subscribe for one new share at the conversion price. The convertible loan and warrant issuance remain subject to approval at the company’s annual general meeting on 15 May 2026, making shareholder consent a key milestone for the completion of this funding plan.

More about Ensurge Micropower

Ensurge Micropower ASA is a Norway-based company listed on the stock exchange, operating in the technology and micropower sector. The company focuses on advanced power solutions and related financing activities to support its operations and growth within the capital markets context.

data.title: Ensurge Secures NOK 60m Convertible Loan to Drive Microbattery Commercialization
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ensurge Micropower ( (ENMPF) ) just unveiled an update.

Ensurge Micropower ASA has secured NOK 60 million in commitments for subordinated, unsecured convertible loans from existing shareholders to fund key commercialization milestones for its microbattery technology. The financing, which may be increased to a maximum of NOK 80 million, is aimed at supporting customer qualification programs, strategic partnerships and the company’s progress toward revenue generation.

The loans carry a 10% paid-in-kind interest rate, a conversion price of NOK 1.00 per share representing a 48% premium to the recent market price, and include warrants plus full ratchet anti-dilution protection for lenders. The structure, subject to shareholder and registry approvals, will see the funds disbursed in three tranches, and the board argues that the premium pricing, broad participation opportunity and speed of execution make the package in the common interest of the company and its shareholders.

More about Ensurge Micropower

Ensurge Micropower ASA is a Norway-based developer of ultra-thin, flexible solid-state lithium microbatteries for next-generation electronic devices. Its proprietary energy storage platform targets space-constrained applications in medical devices, hearables, wearables, industrial systems and defense, and the company is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker ENSU.

data.description:

Asahi Songwon Colors Ltd. ( (IN:ASAHISONG) ) has provided an update.

Asahi Songwon Colors Ltd. has announced that Sudhin Bhagwandas Choksey has resigned from his role as non-executive independent director, effective from the close of business on April 4, 2026. The company stated that Choksey stepped down due to time constraints and has submitted the required regulatory disclosures on this board-level change in line with Securities and Exchange Board of India listing requirements.

The resignation underscores ongoing board refreshment dynamics and compliance with evolving corporate governance norms for listed entities in India. While the company has not yet detailed a replacement, the departure of an independent director places a spotlight on the firm’s board composition and oversight structure, matters closely watched by regulators and investors alike.

More about Asahi Songwon Colors Ltd.

Asahi Songwon Colors Ltd. is an India-based manufacturer in the specialty chemicals sector, focusing on pigment and colorant production for domestic and international markets. The company is listed on both BSE and NSE, reflecting its presence in the public capital markets and its regulatory obligations under Indian securities laws.

Godavari Biorefineries Limited ( (IN:GODAVARIB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Godavari Biorefineries Limited has reported a record sugarcane crushing volume of 2.5 million tonnes during the 2025-26 crushing season at its Sameerwadi unit, marking the highest output in a single crushing session in the company’s history. The crushing season at Sameerwadi is scheduled to conclude on 7 April 2026, and the milestone underscores increased operational throughput that may enhance production capacity and strengthen the company’s position in the sugar and biorefinery market.

Godavari Biorefineries Limited operates in the sugar and bio-based products industry, running integrated facilities that process sugarcane into sugar and related downstream products. data.title: Gujarat Raffia Closes Trading Window Ahead of March-Quarter Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited ( (IN:GUJRAFFIA) ).

Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited has announced closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from 1 April 2026 until 48 hours after the board approves the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter ended 31 March 2026, in compliance with SEBI’s insider trading regulations and its internal code of conduct. During this period, the company’s designated depository, Central Depository Services Limited, will freeze the PANs of designated persons at the security level to prevent trading in the company’s equity shares, underscoring a tightened governance framework around handling unpublished price-sensitive information for the benefit of market integrity and investors.

More about Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited

Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited operates in the industrial textiles and packaging materials segment, producing raffia-based products such as tarpaulins and related polymer goods, primarily serving agricultural, industrial and infrastructure markets in India.

data.title: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Posts Strong Disbursement Growth and Healthier Deposit Mix in Q4 FY26
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Limited ( (IN:UTKARSHBNK) ).

Utkarsh Small Finance Bank reported strong growth in disbursements for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, with total disbursements rising 30.1% year-on-year and 46.1% sequentially, led by a 51.4% jump in non-JLG lending. While the gross loan portfolio was broadly flat year-on-year, the mix shifted decisively towards non-JLG loans, which grew 29.5%, reducing the share of JLG loans and increasing the proportion of secured assets.

On the liabilities side, total deposits were stable year-on-year with a modest quarterly increase, but the composition improved as CASA balances grew 10.6% and retail term deposits rose 19.6%, while bulk term deposits fell 40%, pushing the CASA plus retail term ratio above 82%. Asset quality in micro-banking strengthened significantly, with X bucket collection efficiency near 100% and the SMA pool shrinking through the year, while a high liquidity coverage ratio of 177% underscored the bank’s comfortable liquidity position as it rebalances its portfolio mix and funding base.

More about Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Limited

Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Limited is an Indian small finance bank focused on micro-banking and retail financial services, including joint liability group (JLG) lending and a growing non-JLG portfolio. The bank mobilizes deposits through current, savings and term products, with a rising emphasis on CASA and retail term deposits to support its lending operations and strengthen its liability franchise.

Average Trading Volume: 802,311

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 20.96B INR

data.title: Eurotech Reopens Slate Deadline for Board of Statutory Auditors
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eurotech S.p.A. ( (IT:ETH) ) just unveiled an update.

Eurotech S.p.A. is a multinational technology company that designs, develops and supplies edge computers and Internet of Things solutions, providing integrated hardware, software and services to system integrators and enterprises. Its offerings span IoT platforms, edge gateways for asset monitoring and high-performance edge computers for artificial intelligence applications, supported by a network of global partnerships that strengthen its position in the connected devices and industrial IoT market.

Eurotech announced that, ahead of its ordinary and extraordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026, only one slate of candidates was filed by the original April 4 deadline for the appointment of its Board of Statutory Auditors. In line with regulatory provisions and its meeting notice, the company has reopened the window for submitting additional slates until April 7, 2026, while halving the minimum shareholding threshold to 1%, a move aimed at facilitating broader shareholder participation in the oversight body’s renewal without altering the established filing procedures.

The additional slates that meet the formal requirements will be made available within the legal time frame, ensuring transparency in the selection process for the Board of Statutory Auditors. This step underscores Eurotech’s adherence to Italian market governance rules and may encourage minority shareholders to play a more active role in shaping the company’s supervisory structure, potentially influencing its future governance balance.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ETH) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eurotech S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ETH Stock Forecast page.

More about Eurotech S.p.A.

Eurotech S.p.A. is a multinational technology company that designs, develops and supplies edge computers and Internet of Things solutions, combining hardware, software and services for system integrators and enterprise customers. Its portfolio includes IoT software platforms, edge gateways for asset monitoring and high-performance edge computers for artificial intelligence workloads, supported by partnerships that enhance its global IoT ecosystem.

By working with leading partners, Eurotech positions itself as a provider of best-in-class Internet of Things solutions aimed at enabling advanced data processing at the edge. The company targets organizations seeking scalable, integrated edge and IoT infrastructures, reinforcing its role in the growing market for connected industrial and AI-enabled systems.

data.title: Geekco Converts Insider Debt to Equity to Bolster Balance Sheet
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Geekco Technologies Corporation Class A ( (TSE:GKO) ) has provided an update.

Geekco Technologies Corporation has agreed to settle $223,025 of unpaid royalties owed to Gestion Harland Inc. by issuing 4,460,500 Class A common shares at $0.05, a move aimed at preserving cash and strengthening its balance sheet. The transaction, which remains subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval and securities law resale restrictions, will increase major shareholder Henri Harland’s stake to about 18.5% on an undiluted basis if completed.

The company also closed a separate share-for-debt deal with insider Mario Beaulieu, converting $20,112.52 of unpaid compensation into 402,250 common shares at the same price, likewise subject to a four-month and one-day hold period. Geekco’s board unanimously concluded that these insider-related transactions, conducted under available regulatory exemptions, represent the most strategic financing options in current market conditions and align with efforts to improve the firm’s capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GKO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Geekco Technologies Corporation Class A stock, see the TSE:GKO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GKO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GKO is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (ongoing losses, negative cash flow, and negative equity). Technicals provide some support due to a strong move above key moving averages and positive MACD, but overbought signals add risk. Valuation is also penalized because the company is loss-making (negative P/E) and has no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GKO stock, click here.

More about Geekco Technologies Corporation Class A

Geekco Technologies Corporation is a Montréal-based technology company focused on innovative marketing solutions that connect consumers and businesses at the local level. Its TellMe application lets users discover nearby businesses in real time, access promotions and job opportunities, while giving merchants tools to boost visibility, drive foot traffic, and gather data within a single integrated platform.

Apodaca Inversiones Inmobiliarias SOCIMI SA ( (FR:MLASO) ) just unveiled an update.

Apodaca Inversiones Inmobiliarias SOCIMI has acquired a four-storey building at 85 Capitán Blanco Argibay Street in Madrid, comprising eight residential units and one industrial unit. The €2.3 million purchase has been fully paid and will be added to the company’s rental portfolio for residential leasing.

The transaction reinforces the company’s strategy of expanding its income-generating residential assets in Madrid’s rental market. By integrating this mixed-use property into its portfolio under its existing management approach, Apodaca aims to strengthen its recurring rental revenues and consolidate its position in the local residential leasing segment.

More about Apodaca Inversiones Inmobiliarias SOCIMI SA

Apodaca Inversiones Inmobiliarias SOCIMI, S.A. is a Spanish real estate investment company focused on building and managing a rental property portfolio. Operating primarily in Madrid, it targets residential assets and related units, aligning its strategy with long-term leasing and income generation from urban rental markets.
